overview: Premium high-conversion real estate website for Nyati Property's and Builder — a trusted builder-backed property consultancy in Kota, Rajasthan. Positions the brand as a modern property advisory firm with builder expertise, premium visual design, and multi-channel lead generation via WhatsApp and inquiry forms.
features: Premium sticky navbar with glassmorphism effect
Hero section with trust indicators and floating property cards
Featured properties with popup/modal detail view
Builder Advantage section explaining builder-backed value
Why Choose Us cards with hover animations
Local Market Authority section for key Kota areas
Testimonial slider with auto-scroll and glassmorphism cards
About section with warm professional tone
Lead capture forms storing submissions to backend
Floating WhatsApp button and sticky mobile CTA
Premium footer with contact info and trust statement
